productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl's Pooh Denim Blue Skirt
description: CompositionBlue denim skirt made of 100% cotton with elastic waist band, red ribbon belt and bow, pockets on the sides, pink heart embroidery and applique of PoohWash care1. Machine wash in cold water with gentle cycle using mild detergent2. Wash dark colours seperately3. Do not bleach4. Do not soak or wring5. Dry inside-out6. Do not tumble dry7. Do not iron on print and studsFittingComfort FitThis Pooh denim skirt from disney is perfect for your little princess. The applique work of Winnie the Pooh and heart string embroidery adds a sense of fantasy to this skirt, while the elastic waist and dark denim fabric will stay on snug and keep your little one dry and comfortable while she romps around in the park or runs around with her friends. The skirt can be teamed with the tee of her choice. Add on a pair of pretty footwear from the crocs collection available at myntra, include colourful jibbitz, and transform your little darling into a princess.
